name: symphony
description: Use Symphony workflow protocols from Codex for Pedro's explicit lifecycle loops.

interface.longDescription: Symphony is the local orchestration layer for Pedro's explicit agent lifecycle loops: requirements elicitation into batched draft Linear work packets, implementation dispatch into fresh Codex threads, evidence intake, source-of-truth coverage, Linear issue hygiene, Codex review closeout, worker-thread merge/release proof, Azure DevOps lanes, review artifacts, and stakeholder-facing summaries. It is not a background deploy daemon; ordinary coding and issue-by-issue work stays with normal Codex repo workflows unless Pedro invokes a Symphony lifecycle lane. Codex remains the steward and may delegate visual/presentation passes to Claude.
defaultPrompt: Dispatch this Linear issue to a new thread
